title: Mermaid All Diagram Types Test
description: Comprehensive test of all 10 Mermaid diagram types

props.title: Mermaid Diagram Types - Complete Test Suite

props.content: This page tests all 10 Mermaid diagram types to verify rendering works correctly. Each diagram type is shown with a working example.
Flowcharts visualize workflows, processes, and decision trees with nodes and directional edges.

props.chart:
graph TD
    A[Start] --> B{Decision}
    B -->|Yes| C[Process]
    B -->|No| D[End]
    C --> D

props.content: Sequence diagrams show how processes interact with each other over time, displaying message exchanges between participants.

props.chart:
sequenceDiagram
    participant A as Alice
    participant B as Bob
    A->>B: Hello Bob!
    B->>A: Hello Alice!
    A->>B: How are you?
    B->>A: I'm doing great!

props.content: Class diagrams represent object-oriented programming structures, showing classes, their attributes, methods, and relationships.

props.chart:
classDiagram
    Animal <|-- Duck
    Animal <|-- Fish
    Animal: +int age
    Animal: +String gender
    Animal: +isMammal()
    class Duck{
        +String beakColor
        +swim()
        +quack()
    }
    class Fish{
        -int sizeInFeet
        -canEat()
    }

props.content: State diagrams illustrate the states of a system and transitions between those states based on events.

props.chart:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Still
    Still --> Moving
    Moving --> Still
    Moving --> Crash
    Crash --> [*]

props.content: ER diagrams model database structures, showing entities, their attributes, and relationships between them.
Gantt charts display project schedules, showing tasks, their durations, and dependencies over time.

props.chart:
gantt
    title Project Schedule
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Phase 1
    Task 1 :a1, 2025-01-01, 30d
    Task 2 :after a1, 20d
    section Phase 2
    Task 3 :2025-02-20, 15d
    Task 4 :2025-03-01, 25d

props.content: User journey diagrams map out user experiences and satisfaction levels through different stages of interaction.

props.chart:
journey
    title User Shopping Journey
    section Browse
      Visit site: 5: Me
      Search products: 3: Me
    section Purchase
      Add to cart: 4: Me
      Checkout: 2: Me
    section Post-Purchase
      Receive email: 4: Me
      Track order: 5: Me

props.content: Pie charts display proportional data as slices of a circle, useful for showing percentage distributions.
Git graphs visualize version control workflows, showing commits, branches, and merges.

props.chart:
gitGraph
    commit
    commit
    branch develop
    checkout develop
    commit
    commit
    checkout main
    merge develop
    commit

props.content: Timeline diagrams show chronological events and milestones in a linear, easy-to-follow format.

props.chart:
timeline
    title Development Timeline
    2025-01 : Planning
    2025-02 : Development
    2025-03 : Testing
    2025-04 : Launch

props.content:
---

## Test Results

If all 10 diagrams above render correctly, the Mermaid integration is working as expected. Each diagram type serves different visualization purposes and demonstrates the versatility of Mermaid.js.
